classData.comment:
/**
 * Represents an edge (relationship) bridging two Nodes within the Native Edge Graph Database engine. 
 * Essential for structural GraphRAG topological traversal.
 * Leveraging Neo.data.Model ensures lightweight, schema-validated routing logic between endpoints.
 * 
 * @class Neo.ai.graph.EdgeModel
 * @extends Neo.data.Model
 */
classData.description: Represents an edge (relationship) bridging two Nodes within the Native Edge Graph Database engine. Essential for structural GraphRAG topological traversal. Leveraging Neo.data.Model ensures lightweight, schema-validated routing logic between endpoints.
classData.name: EdgeModel
